languages.text: [Даровать Милость Императора] "Нам остается лишь подарить ему легкую смерть".
[Grant the Emperor's Mercy] "All we can do now is grant him an easy death."
languages.original_text: [Даровать Милость Императора] "Нам остается лишь подарить ему легкую смерть".

traits.locale_text: [Grant the Emperor's Peace] "All we can do now is grant him an easy death."

"All we can do now is grant the patient an easy death."

[Grant the Emperor's Peace] "All we can do now is grant him an easy death."

languages.text: 「今できるのは、患者に安楽死を与えることだけだ」
languages.original_text: "All we can do now is grant the patient an easy death."

traits.locale_text: 「今できるのは、患者に安楽死を与えることだけだ。」

languages.text: [Lui accorder la miséricorde de l'Empereur] « Il n'y a rien d'autre à faire qu'accorder au patient une mort rapide. »
languages.original_text: [Grant the Emperor's Mercy] "All we can do now is grant him an easy death."

traits.locale_text: [Lui accorder la miséricorde de l'Empereur] « Il n'y a rien d'autre à faire qu'accorder au patient une mort rapide. »

languages.text: [İmparator'un Merhameti'ni bahşet] "Artık yapabileceğimiz tek şey, acısız bir ölüm bahşetmek."
languages.original_text: [Grant the Emperor's Mercy] "All we can do now is grant him an easy death."

traits.locale_text: [İmparator'un Merhameti'ni bahşet] "Artık yapabileceğimiz tek şey, acısız bir ölüm bahşetmek."

languages.text: [Gnade des Imperators gewähren] "Wir können ihm nur noch einen schnellen Tod gewähren."
languages.original_text: [Grant the Emperor's Mercy] "All we can do now is grant him an easy death."

traits.locale_text: [Gnade des Imperators gewähren] "Wir können ihm nur noch einen schnellen Tod gewähren."

languages.text: [Otorgar la misericordia del Emperador] «Solo podemos aliviar su muerte».
languages.original_text: [Grant the Emperor's Mercy] "All we can do now is grant him an easy death."

traits.locale_text: [Otorgar la misericordia del Emperador] «Solo podemos aliviar su muerte».

languages.text: 【赐予他帝皇的慈悲】“我们现在唯一能做的，就是让他死得痛快些。”
languages.original_text: [Grant the Emperor's Mercy] "All we can do now is grant him an easy death."
